form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 39-day let-up. First-up after three months 6th of 11 at this track on March 5 over 1200m, 8 len behind Tactical Blitz with 60kg at $21. Previously second-up 5th of 7 at this track on November 22 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Straight Ahead with 59kg at $10. Can do much better this time with the run under her belt.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Finished off last preparation fourth of 8 at this track October 14 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Fizzy Cristal carrying 61kg at $17. form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of four-and-a-half months. form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at Lingfield All Weather on March 27 over 1000m, nose behind Mister Moet carrying 56kg at $4.30. The start before that 3rd of 11 at this track on March 5 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Tactical Blitz with 56kg at $4.50. Making headway. Continues to impress and gets his chance to break through.
